items.title: Chaz hit a 3 right over Nickel at the buzzer, then pushed (maybe shoved) Kayil to create room and knock down another one.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Chaz hit a 3 right over Nickel at the buzzer, then pushed (maybe shoved) Kayil to create room and knock down another one. 

He has 18 points and is 6-8 from deep. Shot 7-12 from 3 yesterday. On an extended heater

items.title: Jack Kayil was named the Basketball Bundesliga Best German Young Player last season.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Jack Kayil was named the Basketball Bundesliga Best German Young Player last season. 

In Bundesliga history, the only players younger than Kayil to win that award are 
Franz Wagner in 2019, 
Johann Grünloh (who started for the University of Virginia last season) 
Dennis Schröder in 2013.

items.title: I won't pretend to know anything about Jack Kayil, but after all the trade-backs, I'm kind of shocked that the Knicks actually drafted a player at 39. Figured they'd just keep kicking the can, picking up extra seconds and saving money with the second apron looming.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: I won't pretend to know anything about Jack Kayil, but after all the trade-backs, I'm kind of shocked that the Knicks actually drafted a player at 39. Figured they'd just keep kicking the can, picking up extra seconds and saving money with the second apron looming.
